reasoning: The stock experienced a massive 20% jump on July 30-31, closing at 193.63 on August 1, driven by a strong Q2 "beat-and-raise" earnings report (22% EPS growth, raised guidance). As instructed, I use this estimate as my primary probability anchor for the shortest horizon (bringing it slightly up to 0.42 because post-earnings momentum can offset mean reversion, and to follow the rule to stay close to 0.5).
